attributes.action: A cure for hayfever. This includes a jab as tablets don’t work
attributes.background: I would like to create a petition for a curr for hayfever. Hayfever tablets do not work and as it’s getting worse each year affecting millions of people i feel like a vaccination needs to come into place. Something that is going to stop hayfever or at least mild it down.

rejection.details:
The UK Government and Parliament aren't responsible for finding cures for hay fever. We could accept a petition calling for the UK Government to fund research into hay fever, if that's something you'd like to see. 

You can find information for coping with illness caused by airborne allergens like hay fever here: https://www.gov.uk/guidance/prevention-and-coping-with-allergen-symptoms
